name: Ballerina Cappucina
lore:
Lore of Ballerina Cappucina
                                    


She is an extraordinary ballerina whose head is replaced by a coffee mug. Once married to Cappuccino Assassino, she is now known as Siren. Typically, she captivates audiences with her graceful dancing or enchanting singing performances.
Description original text
Ballerina Capuccina, mi mi mi miiii. È la moglie di Capuccino Assasino. E ama la musica, la la la la! La sua passione e il ballerino lololo.
Ballerina Kapuccina, Mi Mi Mi Miii. The wife of Kapuccino Asashino. I love music. Lalala! The hobby is to dance with Valerino Roro.
